title: Chat Display (Bubbles)
description: Displays chat messages as a text display above the players, just like bubbles!
body:
A small concept plugin that adds **chat bubbles** to your server. It's somewhat configurable at the moment, I'd like to add more settings to the `config.yml` file in the near future.

|Commands|Usage|Permission|
|--------|-----|----------|
|`chatdisplay`|Reloads the plugin|chatdisplay.cmd|
|`chatdisplay self`|Allows you to see your own chat bubbles|chatdisplay.cmd|
